title: Xtra Smoky Ethiopian Lentils Curry
description: A smoky and savory Ethiopian lentil curry with a charred flavor and a cheese-pull twist, made with cajun and ferment-jang spices and ayurvedic-sattvic friendly ingredients
instructions: Heat the ayurvedic ghee in a large pot over medium heat
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute
Add the cajun spice, ferment-jang paste, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine
Add the red lentils and stir to coat with the spice mixture
Add the vegetable broth and bring the mixture to a boil
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes, or until the lentils are tender
Use an immersion blender to puree the curry to the desired consistency
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed
Serve the curry hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs or scallions
